arts.ttl: Eddie Howe's 'decisive' role as Newcastle United beat Serie A teams to transfer
arts.sum: As clubs on the continent queued up an attractive free transfer, Eddie Howe played a crucial role in ensuring the versatile defender chose Newcastle over all other options. That's according to Andrea Pellegatti, an agent on the inside of the deal to take the defender to St James' Park at the start of the summer window.

arts.ttl: Wolves sweat over the fitness of key trio for crunch Newcastle United clash
arts.sum: “We have an incredibly tough run of fixtures – we have to get stuck in, not many people outside of Wolves will give us much chance in any of them," said O'Neil. O'Neil has challenged his Wanderers squad to ‘get stuck in’ following a t ricky opening run of fixtures.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Newcastle to go head-to-head for "big-money" Bayern attacker?
arts.sum: Premier League rivals Arsenal and Newcastle United are reportedly considering a potential big-money move for Bayern Munich star Leroy Sane.

arts.ttl: Odysseas Vlachodimos transfer truth unearthed and Guardiola's blast at Newcastle United timing
arts.sum: Newcastle's home game with Arsenal will still take place on Saturday, November 2 but the kick-off time has been brought forward to 12:30pm instead of 3pm and the game will be shown live on TNT Sports. Vlachodimos was named in Newcastle's 25-man Premier League squad on Friday and Howe must ponder whether to give Martin Dubravka or the Greek stopper a chance to impress at Wimbledon in round three of the competition the week after next.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Wolves with Sandro Tonali decision and Trippier call - Stuart Jamieson - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Four of the Magpies' next five fixtures before the October international break are away from St James' Park, meaning that if Eddie Howe's side are to continue their positive start to the season then they must pick up wins on the road. However, Lloyd Kelly has been handed the left-back role against Bournemouth and Tottenham, setting up Harvey Barnes' opener against Spurs, so will likely keep the starting shirt at Molineux.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United keen to repeat tactical trick that will rattle Premier League rivals
arts.sum: I think we want to play with a clear plan and want the players to deliver a lot. Eddie Howe wants the intensity back at Newcastle United but insists that it might take a few more weeks to kick in.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer's exciting Newcastle United claim will have Premier League rivals worried
arts.sum: So when he says that Newcastle 'can beat anyone' with attacking duo Alexander Isak and Anthony Gordon in top form, you can be sure rival Premier League sides will take note. However, both impressed on international duty in the past week, with Gordon showing his abilities in England colours after his frustrating EURO24 campaign, and Isak bagging three goals in two games for Sweden.

arts.ttl: Liverpool to compete with Tottenham and Newcastle for 24-year-old Ligue 1 ace
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly keen on signing the former Manchester United midfielder Angel Gomes. They will face competition from Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United as well. According to Football Insider, all three clubs sent scouts to watch the 24-year-old in action earlier this week. arts.ttl: Adrien Rabiot has made a definitive decision regarding a free transfer move to Newcastle United
arts.sum: With the Premier League season already a few games old, that French international, Adrien Rabiot, hasn’t had a new club to this point is a bit of a head scratcher. Though it’s believed his mother and agent strikes a hard bargain where her son’s contracts are concerned, it’s abundantly clear what the 29-year-old can bring […] The post Adrien Rabiot has made a definitive decision regarding a free transfer move to Newcastle United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Yasir Al-Rumayyan's 'affect' wish as Newcastle chairman has 'very positive' meeting
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has revealed he had a 'very positive' meeting with chairman Yasir Al-Rumayyan - who 'wants to try and help affect' Newcastle United . "He's a really positive guy so he always wants to try and help affect us in a good way.
